metadata.description: A focused Team Marketplace: starter engineering defaults, product management, design, technical writing, and testing.

plugins.name: cursor-starter-pack
plugins.description: Engineering baseline: code quality, system design, onboarding, commits, git hygiene, planning, naming, and review agents

plugins.name: product-management
plugins.description: Backlog and delivery: Jira-ready tickets, board summaries, devil's advocate planning critique, Atlassian MCP

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: UI/UX workflows: wireframes, mockups, component and UI engineer agents, Figma MCP

plugins.name: technical-writing
plugins.description: Docs and prose: README updates, weekly reviews, README hygiene, docs writer, optional Notion MCP

plugins.name: testing
plugins.description: Automated tests: test engineer and test runner agents; extend mcp.json for CI or tooling as needed
